Summarize this in one sentence: The mitochondria generates ATP through oxidative phosphorylation, powering cellular functions.
expected: Mitochondria produce energy for cells through a chemical process.
actual: Mitochondria generate ATP to provide the energy necessary for cellular activities.

input: US President Donald Trump will arrive in Beijing on Wednesday (May 13) for a state visit that runs through May 15, the first by a sitting US president to China in almost nine years.
expected: Us president will arrive Beijing on Wednesday (May 13) for a state visit on May 15
actual: President Donald Trump will conduct a state visit to Beijing from May 13 to 15, marking the first visit by a sitting US president to China in nearly nine years.
